metadata.description: Marketplace for the PDLC plugin — Product Development Life Cycle workflow for Claude Code.

plugins.name: pdlc
plugins.description: Product Development Life Cycle workflow — 35 standardized stages (PRD, design, TDD, implement, review, ship, deploy, retro) with hard contracts: artifacts persisted to disk, per-feature state machine, tests-before-code, mandatory self-check, single-shot auto-repair.
